Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.claude/skills/enterprise-qa'\)
os.chdir\('.claude/skills/enterprise-qa'\)
from src.answer import AnswerGenerator
from src.database import DatabaseQuery
from src.knowledge import KnowledgeBase

db = DatabaseQuery\(\)
db.db_path = '../../../enterprise-qa-data/enterprise.db'
kb = KnowledgeBase\(\)
kb.kb_path = '../../../enterprise-qa-data/knowledge'
answer = AnswerGenerator\(db, kb\)
result = answer.generate\('有哪些在研项目？'\)
print\(result\)
" 2>&1)
